title: Restore seed dialog pre-populated on second open
description: Trigger: User opens setup_screen, taps 'Restore from seed', types a hex seed, presses Cancel. Then taps 'Restore from seed' again. _seedHexController still contains the previously-entered text. User may not notice the field is pre-populated, start typing at the cursor, and accidentally restore a concatenated/corrupted seed. The 64-char length check will usually catch this, but if the old text was exactly 64 chars and the user adds characters, they could restore garbage. Fix: clear _seedHexController.clear() before showing the dialog in _restore().
